---
name: "Roadmap Task"
about: "Standardized issue for Mosaic-Tek roadmap items"
title: "[Task] <short-title>"
labels: ["roadmap", "backlog"]
assignees: ["<your-username>"]
---

## 📌 Description
Clearly describe the purpose of this task.  
Example: Configure GitHub Pages deployment for Mosaic-Tek repo.

## ✅ Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Define what must be true for this issue to be considered complete.
- [ ] Example: GitHub Pages is enabled and site loads at repo URL.
- [ ] Example: FastAPI app runs locally with `/consulting` endpoint.

## 🔨 Tasks
- [ ] List the specific steps required.
- [ ] Example: Add `.gitignore` file.
- [ ] Example: Scaffold `main.py` and routers.
- [ ] Example: Push repo to GitHub.
- [ ] Example: Configure Pages branch.

## 📎 References
(Optional) Link to related docs, PRs, or external resources.
